# `mise bootstrap shell apply`

- **Usage**: `mise bootstrap shell apply [-n --dry-run] [-y --yes]`
- **Source code**: [`src/cli/bootstrap/shell/apply.rs`](https://github.com/jdx/mise/blob/main/src/cli/bootstrap/shell/apply.rs)

## Flags

### `-n --dry-run`

Print the actions that would run without writing anything

### `-y --yes`

Skip the confirmation prompt
